Reasoning
Q1
Directions: Study the following information
carefully and answer
the questions given
below:
Twelve students are sitting in parallel rows. E, F,
G, H, I and J sit in row 1 while M, N, O, P, Q and R
sit in row 2. Students in row 1 and row 2 face
each other. Students of row 1 face south while
students of row 2 face north.
F sits second to the right of G, who faces O.
One person sits between O and Q, who sits at
one of the extreme ends. F does not sit at any
extreme end. M sits to the immediate right of N,
who sits fifth left to the Q. R sits opposite I, who
is not adjacent to F. I sits immediately right to
the H. J sits second to the right of E but not
opposite to P.
How many students sit between M and Q in the
same row?
(A) Three
(B) Four
(C) Five
(D) One
(E) Two

Q6
Study the following data carefully and answer
the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 A, B, C, D and E are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 P, Q, R, S
and T are seated and all face towards the
north. People seated in row-1 face people
seated in row-2. S sits in the middle of the row.
The immediate neighbor of S faces E. E sits
three places away from B. T sits diagonally
opposite to B. A faces P. C and Q does not sit
on any of the extreme ends of the row. D sits
right of B.
Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way based on their positions in the above
arrangement and so form a group. Which of the
following does not belong to the group ?
(A) C
(B) S
(C) A
(D) P
(E) R

Q1
Study the following information and answer
the given questions.
Thirteen people A, B, C, L, M, N, P, Q, R, W, X, Y,
and Z are sitting in four rows facing north. There
are five slots in each row and are vertically
aligned. The rows are numbered 1 - 4 from front
to back. N is vertically aligned with neither L nor
X. The number of slots between Q and X is an
odd number. M and A are vertically aligned. Q is
sitting immediately behind Z, who is sitting
adjacent to W. Only one slot is between P and
Y and no one is sitting adjacent to P. R is sitting
at the end of an even numbered row. C and L
are vertically aligned, however L and B are not.
No one is sitting immediately before M. C is
sitting in a row immediately behind P's row. No
one is sitting immediately before X. Only two
slots are between W and R. M and B are sitting
in the same row and are not sitting adjacent to
each other. Y and A are sitting adjacent to
each other. No one is sitting immediately to the
left of L. The number of people sitting in N's row
is less than the number of his row.
1 << 2 means 1 is sitting to the north-east of 2.
1 >> 2 means 1 is sitting to the north-west of 2.
1 ?? 2 means 1 is sitting to the east of 2.
Y >> W >> Q ?? X << B
In which row, the number of people and the
row's number is the same?
(A) Both B and C
(B) Row 2
(C) Row 1
(D) Row 4
(E) Row 3
